function.message: Handled the next inbox item successfully. I applied the OCR workflow to all 8 requested finance documents by extracting visible fields and line items into YAML frontmatter (invoice/bill schema), preserved each original note body verbatim below the frontmatter, and then deleted the processed inbox file.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed required bootstrap (tree -> AGENTS -> context), read nested AGENTS in touched lanes, used process-next-inbox-item + inbox-processing-v2-update + ocr-records workflows, used finance-record-frontmatter schema, preserved full original bodies during migration, and deleted inbox item only after full completion.
function.outcome_justification: Canonical workflow required processing the lowest inbox item, performing schema-driven OCR extraction for requested records, and deleting inbox item upon full completion. All 8 explicitly listed files were read and successfully rewritten with required frontmatter fields and line items derived from visible note content, with original text preserved beneath frontmatter; then 00_inbox/000_next-task.md was deleted.
completed_steps_laconic: read workflow docs: process-next-inbox-item, inbox-processing-v2-update, ocr-records
write migrated frontmatter to all 8 target records
